# Pull Request

## Summary

## Scope and evidence

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] Confirmed requirements, assumptions, open questions, and deferred ideas are
  identified where relevant.
- [ ] Hardware, compatibility, and safety claims are backed by recorded evidence
  or marked as assumptions.

## Documentation

- [ ] README or product documentation is updated when behaviour or scope changes.
- [ ] ADRs are added or updated for architectural decisions.
- [ ] Test and safety documentation is updated where relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the applicable tests, linting, build, or repository validation.
- [ ] I list commands run and their results below.
- [ ] I list checks not run and why below.

## Risks and follow-up work
